title: <div><tt>+3. **Phonology Module** – Implement audio feature extraction and proso
content:
+3. **Phonology Module** – Implement audio feature extraction and prosody analysis. Provide functions to compute stress, rhythm and intonation【33635101037775†L91-L110】.
+4. **Morphology Module** – Integrate morphological segmentation; use unsupervised or Transformer‑based models for low‑resource languages【33635101037775†L112-L128】.
+5. **Syntax Module** – Build or import universal dependency parsers; output parse trees and connect them to rhetorical structures【33635101037775†L129-L144】.
+6. **Semantic Module** – Use semantic role labeling, named entity recognition and sentiment analysis to populate meaning vectors【33635101037775†L144-L156】.
+7. **Pragmatics & Discourse Module** – Implement coreference resolution and dialogue state trackers; model discourse relations via enhanced RST【33635101037775†L157-L170】.
+8. **Sociolinguistic Module** – Build features for dialect/ register detection; maintain locale dictionaries and style shifts【33635101037775†L171-L182】.
+9. **Iconographic Module** – Create mapping functions for emoji/hieroglyph clusters; support custom icons and typographic styles【33635101037775†L259-L266】.
